diagrams.title: CNN Architecture Overview
diagrams.description: Shows the typical flow from input image through convolutional and pooling layers to fully connected output
diagrams.purpose: Understanding end-to-end CNN pipeline for image classification

diagrams.title: Convolution Operation
diagrams.description: Demonstrates how a 3x3 kernel slides over a 5x5 input to produce a 3x3 feature map with stride 1 and no padding
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing spatial feature extraction through convolution

diagrams.title: Residual Block Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows the skip connection in ResNet allowing input to bypass the convolutional layers
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how residual connections enable very deep networks
